source.title: Standard for Day Surgery/Procedure Service
source.population: Patients receiving planned day surgery or procedure services in DoH-licensed facilities, with age, risk, procedure, anesthesia, and discharge qualifications.
source.setting: DoH-licensed day surgery and procedure facilities in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: UAE-direct for service governance, assessment, care plans, pre/intra/post-procedure documentation, records, discharge, and patient education. It does not replace anesthesiologist judgment, facility policy, consent, credentialing, or emergency care.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.

items.previous_wording: handover or follow-up documentation recorded if arranged by clinician

source.title: Suspected cancer: recognition and referral
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with symptoms or signs that may indicate cancer, subject to recommendation-specific age criteria.
source.setting: Primary care recognition, safety netting, investigation, and referral.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected suspicious skin-lesion, safety-netting, and age- or risk-qualified respiratory recommendations; international suspected-cancer pathways require UAE clinician review. This batch also reviews recommendation-qualified upper-GI dysphagia, jaundice, and colorectal rectal-bleeding fields; no cancer diagnosis or automatic referral text is generated. source.exclusions: Exact for selected suspicious skin-lesion, safety-netting, and age- or risk-qualified respiratory recommendations; international suspected-cancer pathways require UAE clinician review. This batch also reviews recommendation-qualified upper-GI dysphagia, jaundice, and colorectal rectal-bleeding fields; no cancer diagnosis or automatic referral text is generated. source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting warning symptoms, when to return for re-evaluation, agreed review, and patient-initiated review if symptoms recur, persist, worsen, or cause concern.

added_items.rationale: Supports warning symptoms, agreed review and return if symptoms persist or worsen for surgical safety-net documentation; no decision is generated.
